chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-390 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case. 06.05.2025 Syed Asghar Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, AAG ***************** Mr. Miran Bux Shar, advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondents No.3 & 4 and a statement on behalf of Chief Municipal Officer, Municipal Committee Khairpur along with an original cheque bearing No.52646692 amounting to Rs.300,000/- (Rupees Three Hundred Thousand). Original cheque has been handed over to the petitioner after his proper acknowledgment. In his statement, Chief Municipal Officer, Municipal Committee, Khairpur, submits that outstanding amount would be paid to the petitioner in equal installment of Rs.200,000/- each month. Statement further reflects that remaining amount of Rs.6,65,898/- is outstanding, therefore, two installments of Rs.200,000/- be given to the petitioner in upcoming two months, however, in the 3rd month, remaining amount of Rs.265898/- be paid to the petitioner, without fail. On his undertaking, instant petition stands disposed of. It is made clear that if the undertaking/ statement is violated, contempt proceedings would be initiated against him. JUDGE JUDGE Faisal Mumtaz/PS
